# Korean Market & Crypto Trends API - Full Context

> Hourly South Korea market data for developers: Google Trends topics, KRW exchange rates, and crypto Kimchi Premium spreads.

Generated at: 2026-07-01T01:23:20.981Z
Homepage: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/
Commercial access: https://rapidapi.com/GERMANKBR/api/korean-trends-api1
OpenAPI: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/openapi.json

## Positioning
The API is built for developers who need Korea-specific market intelligence without maintaining their own collectors. GitHub Actions refreshes the static JSON origin hourly. RapidAPI is the commercial gateway for keys, quotas, subscriptions, and billing.

## Endpoints
- GET /api/v1/trends.json: South Korea Google Trends topics with traffic labels and related news.
- GET /api/v1/rates.json: KRW exchange rates for USD, EUR, JPY, CNY, GBP, AUD, CAD, CHF, SGD, and HKD.
- GET /api/v1/crypto.json: Kimchi Premium top coins summary with link to full dataset.
- GET /api/v1/premium-all.json: Full Kimchi Premium data for all dynamically discovered coins (Upbit KRW ∩ Binance USDT).
- GET /api/v1/meta.json: API metadata, source status, pricing entry point, and endpoint catalog.

- 1. 멕시코 대 에콰도르 (20000+)

- 7. 오늘의 운세 (200+)
- 8. 기흥구 (500+)
- 9. sonnet 5 (500+)
- 10. 날씨 (100000+)

- API catalog: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/catalog.json
- JSON Feed: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/feed.json
- RSS Feed: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/feed.xml
- Atom Feed: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/atom.xml
- AI Manifest: https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/.well-known/ai-manifest.json

## Machine Summary
```json
{
  "top_trends": [
    "멕시코 대 에콰도르",
    "박성광",
    "경기지역화폐",
    "미래에셋증권",
    "매드업"
  ],
  "krw_per_usd": 1548.63,
  "kimchi_premium": {
    "average_premium_percentage": 4.73,
    "tracked_assets": 10,
    "highest_premium": {
      "symbol": "AI",
      "premium_percentage": 47.93,
      "direction": "kimchi_premium"
    },
    "lowest_premium": {
      "symbol": "TRAC",
      "premium_percentage": -5.12,
      "direction": "kimchi_discount"
    }
  },
  "source_status": {
    "trends": "ok",
    "rates": "ok",
    "crypto": "ok"
  }
}
```

Data is informational only and not financial advice.
